title: Time Cures All
content:
It was my shame, and now it is my boast,
    That I have loved you rather more than most.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Hilaire Belloc, titled "Time Cures All", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
